notes: pass must be returned to library
raw: This pass admits up to 2 adults and anyone under 18 for free . This is a physical pass that must be picked up at and returned to the library . You must book your tickets online for the site you want to visit. To do this, use the coupon code you receive in an email after reserving the pass . Historic New England consists of 38 sites around the six New England states! Hours and holidays vary amongst the sites and can be verified online when purchasing tickets.
